commands.review_summary:
The branch reworks doctor lint/fix so core health checks come from ordered doctor contributions while bundled/plugin checks remain on the shared health registry path, with focused tests and doctor docs updated.

PR surface: Source -206, Tests -51, Docs +2. Total -255 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established. Source inspection shows current main routes core doctor checks through the shared registry path, but I did not run a real `openclaw doctor` command and the PR lacks after-fix terminal proof.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer review plus contributor real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to queue from this review.
